title: 10x 4.0 x 20mm Chipboard Countersunk Head Wood Screws A2 Stainless Steel Chipboard Screws for Floorboards Wood Fences DIY Furniture & Repairs - Corrosion-Resistant and Durable
features: Made from corrosion-resistant A2 stainless steel.
Countersunk head ensures a flush finish for clean aesthetics.
Fully threaded for maximum holding power in wood applications.
Available in multiple sizes (3mm to 6mm) for various projects.
Ideal for securing chipboard, floorboards, fences, and DIY furniture.
description: Product Description Countersunk Screws Dimensions Our Countersunk Screws Dimensions include head height, head diameter, length & diameter.
